form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, came from midfield and won by a neck at this track Mdn March 5 over 1400m defeating Batista with 57kg at $10. Second-up 5th of 11 at Belmont Park Cl3 on April 2 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Peter Gunn with 57.5kg at $26. Improver who is better placed.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 10 at Belmont Park Cl3 on March 25 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Pony Up with 53kg at $8.50. The start before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 7 at York on March 15 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Superb Vintage with 57.5kg at $2.20. Definite winning chance. Best form sees her measure right up.
